# Status Machine

> Auto-generated by mtix v0.1.0-beta-1-g12189ab. Do not edit manually.

## Statuses

- **open**
- **in_progress**
- **blocked**
- **done**
- **deferred**
- **cancelled**
- **invalidated**


## Valid Transitions

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: STATE_MACHINE -->
| From | To | Constraint |
|------|----|------------|
| blocked | cancelled | none |
| blocked | in_progress | auto_only |
| blocked | invalidated | auto_only |
| blocked | open | auto_only |
| cancelled | invalidated | auto_only |
| cancelled | open | requires_reopen |
| deferred | cancelled | none |
| deferred | in_progress | requires_claim |
| deferred | invalidated | auto_only |
| deferred | open | none |
| done | invalidated | auto_only |
| done | open | requires_reopen |
| in_progress | blocked | auto_only |
| in_progress | cancelled | none |
| in_progress | deferred | none |
| in_progress | done | none |
| in_progress | invalidated | auto_only |
| in_progress | open | requires_unclaim |
| invalidated | cancelled | none |
| invalidated | deferred | requires_restore |
| invalidated | in_progress | requires_restore |
| invalidated | open | requires_restore |
| open | blocked | auto_only |
| open | cancelled | none |
| open | deferred | none |
| open | in_progress | none |
| open | invalidated | auto_only |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED -->

## Rules

- Idempotent transitions (same→same) are always allowed as no-ops
- `auto_only` transitions are managed by the system, not user commands
- `requires_reopen` must go through `mtix reopen`
- `requires_unclaim` must go through `mtix unclaim` with a reason
- `requires_restore` must go through `mtix restore` or `mtix rerun`
- `requires_claim` must go through `mtix claim`
